titleEn: IFCO renews Cradle to Cradle Full Scope Silver certification
contentHtml: IFCO European Lift Lock reusable packaging containers (RPCs) have been recertified with Cradle to Cradle Certified® Full Scope Silver under the Version 4.1 standard. The recertification confirms that the RPCs continue to meet requirements for material health, product circularity, clean air and climate…
